Dental Implants Morocco

Restore Your Smile in
Tangier, Morocco

World-class dental implants in Tangier at a fraction of the cost. Dr. Reda Saoui provides premium implantology services for international patients.

Call NowWhatsApp

Best Dentist in Tangier for Implants

Looking for dental implants in Morocco? APEX Dental Clinic in Tangier offers state-of-the-art implant solutions using Yomi robot-assisted technology.

Dr. Reda Saoui is a leading implantologist in Tangier, dedicated to restoring your confidence and oral health with precision and care.

Suffer from dental anxiety?
Discover our Solea Laser solution

In our dental practice in Tangier, we address dental anxiety with the innovative Solea Laser, a pain-free solution that eliminates the need for drills, needles, scalpels, or loud noises during treatments. With this technology, you can experience dental care without stress or discomfort!

Your Implant Journey

Step-by-step guide to your new smile in Tangier.

1

Step 1: Virtual Consult

Send us your X-rays for a preliminary plan and quote.

2

Step 2: Arrival & Surgery

Arrive in Tangier, comprehensive exam, and implant placement.

3

Step 3: Healing Period

Go home and heal while the implant integrates with your bone.

4

Step 4: Final Restoration

Return for the attachment of your permanent, beautiful teeth.

Why Choose Us for Implants?

We combine advanced technology with affordable pricing, making us the top choice for dental tourism in Morocco.

Yomi Robot Precision
International Standards
Affordable Luxury
English Speaking Team

Implant Solutions

Single Tooth Implant

Replace a missing tooth with a natural-looking, durable implant.

All-on-4 / All-on-6

Full arch restoration for a completely new smile in just one trip.

Bone Grafting

Advanced procedures to prepare your jaw for successful implantation.

Sinus Lift

Expert sinus augmentation ensures a solid foundation for your upper implants.

Immediate Loading

Walk out with a new smile the same day in selected cases.

Computer Guided Surgery

Minimally invasive surgery for faster healing and less discomfort.

State-of-the-Art Facility

Our clinic is equipped with the latest technology for safe and precise implant surgery.

Yomi Robot

Robotic assistance for perfect implant placement.

CBCT Scanner

3D imaging for accurate treatment planning.

Sterilization Center

Hospital-grade sterilization for your safety.

Recovery Room

Relax in comfort after your procedure.

Dental Tourism Tips

Plan Ahead

Contact us before your trip to schedule a virtual consultation.

Enjoy Tangier

Combine your treatment with a vacation in our beautiful city.

Aftercare

We provide detailed aftercare instructions for your journey home.

Accommodation

We can recommend nearby hotels for your comfort.

Start Your JourneyWhatsApp Us
